case_title: THANDAVAMOORTHY SUBBIAH VS. GXP BIOPHARM LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUBBIAH, THANDAVAMOORTHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GXP BIOPHARM LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $126,339.18 PRINCIPAL, $1,842.96 INTEREST, $325.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $128,507.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
